explore.title: Explore
explore.genresDescription: Discover stories across Action, Romance, Fantasy, and more. Our collection is curated daily with the latest releases.
explore.smartDescription: Use our advanced search to find exactly what you're looking for by tags, status, or artist.

empty.updatesDescription: We'll notify you here as soon as your followed manga get new chapters.
empty.libraryDescription: Start adding your favorite manga to your library to track your progress and never miss a release.
